name: embedxpl
summary: Embedded & Perimeter Security Assessment Framework — 3000+ modules, 600+ CVEs, 80+ vendors. Unified from FirewallXPL-Forge, ISF OT/ICS protocol clients, and deep ExploitDB/Metasploit coverage. v2.4.0 adds Mirai/Condi reference analysis (string decoder, orchestrator), GPON scanner, C2 beacon detector, CnC simulation lab.
